data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of 'Guardian/minor signature workflows' as outlined in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the existence or functionality of such workflows. The absence of this critical information indicates a gap in meeting the requirement, as it is explicitly stated as a need in the linked use case.
gaps: No evidence of implementation or validation of Guardian/minor signature workflows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
